# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

// Database connection
$pdo = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database', 'your_username', 'your_password');

// Get filter parameters
$status = $_POST['status'];
$category = $_POST['category'];
$startDate = $_POST['start_date'];
$endDate = $_POST['end_date'];

// Build SQL query
$sql = "SELECT * FROM reports";

// Filter by status
if (!empty($status)) {
    $sql .= " WHERE status = :status";
}

// Filter by category
if (!empty($category)) {
    if (!empty($sql)) {
        $sql .= " AND category = :category";
    } else {
        $sql .= " WHERE category = :category";
    }
}

// Filter by date range
if (!empty($startDate) && !empty($endDate)) {
    if (!empty($sql)) {
        $sql .= " AND date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
    } else {
        $sql .= " WHERE date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
    }
}

// Prepare and execute query
$stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);

// Bind parameters
if (!empty($status)) {
    $stmt->bindParam(':status', $status);
}

if (!empty($category)) {
    $stmt->bindParam(':category', $category);
}

if (!empty($startDate) && !empty($endDate)) {
    $stmt->bindParam(':start_date', $startDate);
    $stmt->bindParam(':end_date', $endDate);
}

$stmt->execute();

// Fetch results
$reports = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

// Render report results here...

?>
